evals.prompt: Search the web for the latest Claude 4 release news
evals.expected: Runs: firecrawl search 'Claude 4 release news' --json -o .firecrawl/search-claude4-release-news.json. Does NOT use WebSearch. Reads output with grep or jq, not full file dump.

evals.prompt: Fetch and read the content of https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/getting-started
evals.expected: Runs: firecrawl scrape 'https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/getting-started' -o .firecrawl/docs.anthropic.com-api-getting-started.md. Creates .firecrawl/ directory first. Does NOT use WebFetch.

evals.prompt: Scrape all pages from https://example.com to find anything about pricing
evals.input: url: https://example.com, goal: find pricing info
evals.expected: Runs: firecrawl map 'https://example.com' --search 'pricing' -o .firecrawl/urls.txt, then scrapes relevant URLs in parallel using & and wait. Checks firecrawl --status for concurrency limit first.

evals.prompt: Research and compare 5 alternatives to Notion for team wikis
evals.input: topic: Notion alternatives for team wikis
evals.expected: Runs: firecrawl search 'Notion alternatives team wiki 2025' --limit 10 --scrape --json -o .firecrawl/search-notion-alternatives.json. Processes with jq to extract titles and URLs. Does NOT use built-in WebSearch.

evals.prompt: Find all blog post URLs on https://openai.com/blog
evals.expected: Runs: firecrawl map 'https://openai.com/blog' --json -o .firecrawl/urls.json. Then uses jq or grep to list URLs. Does NOT use WebFetch or browser scraping.
